'''''Intruder''''' was a [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]].

Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], this ship led a mercenary force to disrupt a meeting between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] and members of the [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]].

Along with a number of [[IRD-A starfighter|IRDs]], [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]]s, and [[Preybird-class starfighter|Preybirds]] of ''[[Soro-Suul]]'' squadron, ''Intruder'' attacked the Bothan [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] [[Tal'cara (Dreadnaught-class)|''Tal'cara'']] and [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] [[Jade (Lambda-class)|''Jade'']]. [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wings]] from ''Liberty's'' Gold Group helped fend them off.

''Intruder'' was destroyed, but not before ejecting an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] which was captured by [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] ''[[Compassion]]''. Pod [[EE-763]] carried a survivor who claimed the strike force was hired by the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]], but this was actually part of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] plot to sow discord among Alliance members.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
